infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: StallPass uses your location to find nearby bathrooms.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: StallPass uses your location in the background to surface nearby bathrooms while you're on the move.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: StallPass uses your camera to let you add photos of bathroom facilities.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: StallPass accesses your photo library so you can upload bathroom photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: StallPass saves bathroom photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: StallPass sends notifications about nearby bathrooms and community updates.
